profile.name: Tanapon Yurawan
profile.intro: I am a software developer with a strong interest and expertise in Full-stack Development, Automation Systems, and Cybersecurity.

projects.title: Computer Science Testing & Evaluation Hub
description: Built a scalable online coding exam platform featuring real-time automated evaluation.
Integrated Judge0 and Monaco Editor to support 5+ programming languages.
Engineered live leaderboards and concurrent execution using Docker, PostgreSQL, and Redis.

projects.title: Photobooth Frontend Interface
description: Photobooth Dober An interactive web photobooth application. Key features include live photo capturing, customizable frames,
custom filters/stickers, and a realistic printing animation.

details.overview: Sparkle Booth is an interactive web photobooth experience built entirely in the browser. Inspired by the retro charm of real-world photo booths, it lets users capture live photos, pick from multiple layout formats, customize frames, and watch a satisfying print animation before saving their strip.
features: Live camera capture via WebRTC browser API
Multiple layout formats — 4-shot strip, triptych, stack, credential

projects.title: Credential Deduplication Automation
description: Reduced CloudSEK report processing time from 30+ minutes to under 1 minute.
Developed a full-stack automation pipeline via n8n and PostgreSQL upsert logic, eliminating manual duplication across thousands of records.

projects.title: Car Service Tracker
description: Full-stack vehicle maintenance tracker with LINE OAuth login, multi-car management, and automated LINE Flex Message reminders before service intervals.
Built with Next.js, .NET, and Supabase — featuring expense dashboards and PDF/CSV export.

details.overview: A full-stack vehicle maintenance tracking platform built to solve the common problem of forgetting service schedules and losing paper receipts. Users log in instantly via LINE OAuth, register multiple vehicles with full details and photos, and log every service record — oil changes, tyres, brakes — with cost, mileage, garage name, and receipt photo. The platform calculates the next maintenance interval and fires a LINE Flex Message reminder 7 days ahead, keeping vehicles in peak condition without any manual tracking.
features: LINE OAuth 2.0 login — frictionless access without passwords or new account registration
Multi-vehicle garage management with brand, model, year, plate, mileage, and photo
Comprehensive service logs with receipt photo storage, cost tracking, and garage details
Monthly expense dashboard (bar chart) with urgent-care vehicle highlights on the home screen
Proactive LINE Flex Message notifications 7 days before the next scheduled service interval
Timeline and calendar view with Google Calendar export (.ics) for appointment planning
Full service history export as formatted PDF (QuestPDF) or CSV

projects.title: SOC Alert Monitoring Dashboard
description: Centralized security alerts into an n8n dashboard using CrowdStrike APIs.
Streamlined incident triage and significantly reduced manual lookup time across SOC workflows.

projects.title: Automated Task Notification System
description: Engineered an n8n and Slack workflow polling REST APIs every 2 hours to auto-tag assignees for overdue tasks.
Boosted team accountability and eliminated missed deadlines.

projects.title: Web Vulnerability Pentesting
description: Identified 20+ vulnerabilities (Broken Access Control, XSS, Parameter Tampering) via grey-box penetration testing.
Delivered severity-graded remediation reports with clear mitigation guidance.
